## Checklist

- [ ] Edited skills only under `skills/<name>/` (not the generated `plugins/*/skills/` copies)
- [ ] Ran `npm run sync` (if a skill/script changed)
- [ ] Ran `npm run validate` — it printed "validation passed"
- [ ] Registered any new plugin in **both** marketplaces (`.agents/plugins/marketplace.json` and `.claude-plugin/marketplace.json`)
- [ ] Updated `CHANGELOG.md`
- [ ] Commits follow Conventional Commits
